_comment: Maps each QET element FILENAME to its PanelKit pin names in terminal order. Keys are trailing .elmt filenames (not full paths) because real QET saves rewrite collection paths to embed://import/... — match on the basename. Required because QET stores no usable terminal names (verified: real placed terminals carry name absent, '', or the placeholder '_'). The importer assigns the i-th <terminal> of a placed element (document order) to pin_names[i]. Ship one entry per element in the PanelKit-matched QET symbol collection, alongside matching PanelKit part JSONs.
